body.title: Redesign inference proxy as mini-rack: providers + models separate
body.description: The inference proxy is a self-contained mini-rack with 5 internal components. SOURCES: API keys/endpoints/wire format/availability. MODELS: capability specs/cost/latency/quality scores. RULES: priority-ordered routing policy, health-aware, session-affinity-aware. HEALTH: background ping loop feeding back into Rules. STORE: internal only — request log, per-caller billing ledger, semantic cache, model quality scores. Billing per caller is foundational. Highest priority: unlocks OR/Ollama/Qwen for Granny without burning Anthropic account. **Affected files:** devices/inference/ (full redesign). **Scope boundary:** 5-component mini-rack, internal Store, no Scraps dependency. Phase 2: graph tree rules. **Completion criteria:** (1) Route to Anthropic/OR/Ollama interchangeably. (2) Every request logged. (3) Per-caller billing accurate. (4) Health monitor reroutes within one poll cycle.
